_publications._publicationTitle: Genome-wide association study of café-au-lait macule number in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: There were 15 RPS6KA2 SNPs with suggestive genome‐wide significance ( p < 1.0 × 10 −5 ) using simple linear regression (SLR) in the CALM1 cohort
details: Successfully sequenced ~24 Kb of intron 1 of RPS6KA2 and identified 15 SNPs with suggestive genome-wide significance (p < 1.0 × 10^-5) in CALM1 cohort
